title: rhododendron × fragrans
intro: Rhododendron × fragrans, also known as the fragrant azalea, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Rhododendron spp. and Rhododendron spp. or possibly between Rhododendron spp. and other azalea species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron × fragrans include its potential to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and offer protection against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
